docket_entries.description: JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER VICKI GROSS. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-07-2002 AT 11:10 AM IN DEPT. 306, KEVIN M. MCCARTHY. CASE SETTLED, SENT TO PUT THE TERMS ON THE RECORD.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT STANDARD CONSTRUCTION OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. DBA S TANDARD ROOFING COMPANY,  A CA. CORP.

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-07-2002 IN DEPT. 306 - PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT. DEF SHALL PAY $10,000 IN 30 DAYS, THEN PLTF SHALL FILE DISMISSAL W/ PREJUDICE. IF DEF. DOES NOT PAY, THEN PLTF. SHALL GIVE 48 HRS NOTICE OF MOVING THE COURT FOR JUDGMENT OF $18,573.71 (WHICH INCLUDES ATTY FEES & COSTS).
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
